##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/mapping/archive/page 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/mapping/archive/page 
 ## 接口描述 
用于医招智付场景分页查询集采档案信息，对应页面为医招智付-集采平台-规则设置-集采档案处列表页，单次查询不能超过500条 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platformCode","required":true,"label":"%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"fuJianProvincePlatform","desc":"%20%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0A%E6%B1%9F%E8%8B%8F%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AjiangSuProvincePlatform%20%20%0A%E7%A6%8F%E5%BB%BA%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AfuJianProvincePlatform%20%20%0A%E6%B1%9F%E8%A5%BF%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AjiangXiProvincePlatform"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"archiveName","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E7%89%B9%E6%AE%8A%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84","desc":"%20%E5%BD%92%E5%B1%9E%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%EF%BC%8C%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E5%8C%BB%E6%8B%9B%E6%99%BA%E4%BB%98-%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0-%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%9A%84%E7%9B%B8%E5%BA%94%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"sourceIdList","required":false,"label":"%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%BE%93%E5%85%A5%E5%80%BC%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%2221934%22%5D","desc":"%20%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%BE%93%E5%85%A5%E5%80%BC%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E6%97%B6%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%B1%9E%E6%80%A7%E4%B8%BA%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%BE%93%E5%85%A5%E5%80%BC%E7%9A%84%E8%A1%A8%E5%A4%B4%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7500%E6%9D%A1"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"5","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7500","maxLength":"500"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"total","required":false,"label":"%E7%AC%A6%E5%90%88%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F","exampleValue":"1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"list","required":false,"label":"%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sourceId","required":false,"label":"%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%BE%93%E5%85%A5%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"21934","desc":"%20%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E6%97%B6%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%B1%9E%E6%80%A7%E4%B8%BA%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%BE%93%E5%85%A5%E5%80%BC%E7%9A%84%E8%A1%A8%E5%A4%B4%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sourceName","required":false,"label":"%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%BE%93%E5%85%A5%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E","exampleValue":"%E6%B3%A8%E5%B0%84%E7%94%A8%E7%94%B2%E8%8B%AF%E7%A3%BA%E9%85%B8%E7%91%9E%E9%A9%AC%E5%94%91%E4%BB%91","desc":"%20%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E6%97%B6%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%B1%9E%E6%80%A7%E4%B8%BA%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%BE%93%E5%85%A5%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E7%9A%84%E8%A1%A8%E5%A4%B4%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"targetId","required":false,"label":"%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E4%BA%A7%E5%87%BA%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"%E6%98%AF","desc":"%20%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E6%97%B6%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%B1%9E%E6%80%A7%E4%B8%BA%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E4%BA%A7%E5%87%BA%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E7%9A%84%E8%A1%A8%E5%A4%B4%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"targetName","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%87%BA%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E","exampleValue":"null","desc":"%20%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E6%97%B6%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%B1%9E%E6%80%A7%E4%B8%BA%E4%BA%A7%E5%87%BA%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E7%9A%84%E8%A1%A8%E5%A4%B4%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5"}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
  "platformCode": "fuJianProvincePlatform",
  "archiveName":"特殊药品映射",
  "sourceIdList":["21934"],
  "start": 0,
  "limit": 5
}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": {
        "total": 1,
        "list": [
            {
                "sourceId": "21934",
                "sourceName": "注射用甲苯磺酸瑞马唑仑",
                "targetId": "是",
                "targetName": null
            }
        ]
    },
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | EROOR1| 调用失败|
  | EROOR2| 执行失败，分页查出最大限制、当前企业未配置集采平台信息等|
  | SUC0000| 执行成功|
